testCases.name: test_case_1
testCases.input: What condition must a product be in for a return to be accepted?
testCases.actualOutput:
To be accepted for a return, the product must meet the following conditions:
*   Be unused and in the same condition in which it was received.
*   Keep its original packaging, tags, seals, and all accessories.
*   Include proof of purchase (digital receipt or order number).
*   Not belong to the excluded categories listed in Section 3.
testCases.expectedOutput: The product must be unused and in the same condition it was received, keep its original packaging, tags, seals and accessories, and include proof of purchase (digital receipt or order number).
retrievalContext:
Kaan Store · www.kaanstore.com · Page 1
 KAAN STORE
 Returns & Exchanges Policy
Last updated: July 6, 2026. At Kaan Store we want your shopping experience to be excellent. If for any
reason you are not satisfied with your order, the following Returns & Exchanges Policy applies to all
purchases made through our website and mobile app.
1. Time frame for returns and exchanges
You have 30 calendar days from the delivery date of your order to request a return or exchange. After this
period, requests cannot be processed, except for manufacturing-defect warranty claims described in
Section 6.
2. Product conditions
For your request to be accepted, the product must meet the following conditions:
 Be unused and in the same condition in which it was received.
 Keep its original packaging, tags, seals, and all accessories.
 Include proof of purchase (digital receipt or order number).
 Not belong to the excluded categories listed in Section 3.
3. Non-returnable items
For hygiene, safety, or product-nature reasons, we do not accept returns or exchanges in the following
cases:
 Underwear, swimwear, and socks.
 Opened personal care products, cosmetics, and fragrances.
 Gift cards and digital products (downloads, licenses).
 Clearance or final-sale items marked as "Non-returnable".
 Personalized or made-to-order products.
4. How to request a return or exchange
Step
Description
1
Log in to your account at www.kaanstore.com and go to "My Orders".
2
Select the order and click "Request a return or exchange".
3
Select the reason and attach photos if the product arrived damaged.
4
You will receive a prepaid shipping label by email within 24-48 hours.

Kaan Store · www.kaanstore.com · Page 2
5
Pack the product and drop it off at the indicated carrier.
6
Once received and inspected (3-5 business days), we will process your exchange or refund.
5. Refunds
Refunds are issued to the same payment method used for the purchase:
 Credit or debit card: 5 to 10 business days, depending on your bank.
 PayPal / Mercado Pago: 3 to 5 business days.
 Cash payments (OXXO, bank deposit): bank transfer within 7 business days, after validating your
account details.
 Kaan store credit: credited immediately, valid for 12 months.
Original shipping costs are only refunded when the return is due to an error by Kaan Store (wrong,
damaged, or defective product).
6. Manufacturing-defect warranty
All our products are covered by a 90-day warranty against manufacturing defects, in accordance with
applicable consumer protection laws. If your product has a defect, contact us with photographic evidence
and we will offer a replacement, repair, or full refund, including shipping costs.
7. Size or color exchanges
The first size or color exchange is free of charge. Additional exchanges for the same order carry a $99
MXN shipping fee. Exchanges are subject to inventory availability; if the desired item is not available, a
refund or store credit will be issued.
8. Contact us
If you have any questions about this policy, email us at support@kaanstore.com, reach us on WhatsApp
at +52 981 000 0000, or call 800 123 4567, Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. (Central Mexico
Time).
 Sample document for demonstration purposes only. Kaan Store is a fictional company.
